creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
Thanks you for incorporating the applicable suggestions!
As soon as I'll have to deal with samba again, I'll check if the dependency pitfall (linking if found inside samba build infrastructure) can be addressed.

Most important, your recent commit seems to also address https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=193734. Can you please change the state of the bug report?

Thanks a lot,

-Harry
